appmesh.virtualnode.outlierdetection.Cfn: An object that represents the outlier detection for a virtual node's listener.

appmesh.virtualnode.outlierdetection.Bas.Description: The base amount of time for which a host is ejected.

appmesh.virtualnode.outlierdetection.Int.Description: The time interval between ejection sweep analysis.

appmesh.virtualnode.outlierdetection.Max.Description: Maximum percentage of hosts in load balancing pool for upstream service that can be ejected. Will eject at least one host regardless of the value.
Number of consecutive `5xx` errors required for ejection.
